mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inquiry ( business_name, manager_name, phone_number, email, current_meal_price, desired_meal_price, daily_meal_count, meal_type, business_type, switching_reason, title, inquiry_content, answer_yn, submitted_at, source, erp_sync_target, reg_dt, mod_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{businessName}, #{managerName}, #{phoneNumber}, #{email}, #{currentMealPrice}, #{desiredMealPrice}, #{dailyMealCount}, #{mealType}, #{businessType}, #{switchingReason}, #{title}, #{inquiryContent}, 'N', STR_TO_DATE(#{submittedAt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #{source}, #{erpSyncTarget}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, business_name, manager_name, phone_number, email, title, answer_yn, DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS submitted_at, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(mod_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_inquiry WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, business_name, manager_name, phone_number, email, current_meal_price, desired_meal_price, daily_meal_count, meal_type, business_type, switching_reason, title, inquiry_content, answer_yn, source, erp_sync_target, user_id, mod_id, DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS submitted_at, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(mod_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at, del_yn, DATE_FORMAT(del_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS del_dt FROM tb_inquiry WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, inquiry_id, content, user_id, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS registered_at, mod_id, DATE_FORMAT(mod_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS modified_at, del_yn, DATE_FORMAT(del_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS del_dt FROM tb_inquiry_reply WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inquiry_reply ( inquiry_id, content, user_id, reg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{inquiryId}, #{content}, #{userId}, NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_inquiry_reply SET content = #{content}, mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE tb_inquiry SET answer_yn = 'Y', mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE tb_inquiry SET del_yn = 'Y', del_dt = NOW(), mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE tb_inquiry_reply SET del_yn = 'Y', del_dt = NOW(), mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId} AND del_yn = 'N'
